title: Top B.A (Hons) Economics Colleges in Noida, Delhi NCR
content: Economics as a Programme is mix of traditional economics courses and modern day analytical tools on data analysis. The complexity and diversity of our globalized world makes a liberal arts education more relevant than ever. The Economics Program designed to introduce students to the theoretical and analytical frameworks. The Program trains students to generate analysis and critical insights rooted in appropriate methodological approaches, through reflective reading and writing and interpretation of data pertaining to economic activities. These skills are imparted to students through experiential learning and field survey. Students in the programme receive extensive research training, as they will do qualitative and quantitative research throughout their degree and complete an independent research project in their final year. The bachelor's program in Economics provides practical exposure in terms of research and field practice. The weightage of these courses is more than 30%. NOTE: For selected 3 Year Undergraduate programs, you have the option to continue for 4th year to obtain an Honours with Research Degree. XII with minimum 50% marks in aggregate Students with a CUET / SAT (DI Code - 71057 ) score will be given preference in the merit list For Migration from Other Universities: 1) B.A (Hons) Economics Ist yr. minimum 50% marks or 5.0 CGPA on a 10 point scale 2) 50% or above at XII level in Best Four relevant subjects 01 The graduates will be able to analyze and optimise economic concepts. 02 The graduates will develop an ability to work efficiently as leader / team member with a holistic view. 03 The graduates will generate a culture of lifelong learning to achieve personal enrichment and professional ethics. 04 The graduates will be able to evaluate, analyze and optimise economic theories for design and development. 05 The graduates will develop an ability to work efficiently as team leader. 06 The graduates will generate a culture of lifelong learning in an inclined environment to achieve personal enrichment and professional ethics. 01 Provide systematic knowledge of theory and its practices 02 Empower the students relate to economic resource management 03 Learning and understanding the various schools of economic thoughts 04 Understanding and enhancing the decision-making process 05 Develop critical and analytical thinking 06 Engage in intellectual practices and active participation with practitioners 07 Readiness to face and deal with the vocational world 08 Understand the symbiotic relationship between economics and environment 09 Develop awareness of good practices for sustainable development 10 Empower and enhance the understanding of change and growth with a world view 01 Graduates will drive entrepreneurship initiatives and start-ups. 02 Graduates will be equipped to pursue higher education and competitive examinations. 03 Graduates will be able to serve Public, Private and NGOs to achieve personal enrichment and professional goals. 01 Instigate, Formulate, Estimate and Implement Economic issues with the help of Quantitative Economic analysis through PSS etc. 02 Identify, Comprehend, and Analyze the issues related to Financial Economics and related intermediaries like institutions and market etc. 03 Investigate, Apprehend and visualize the impact of Economic and Natural Activities on Environment, Agriculture, Industries, and Health.
